description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical electronic device with a dark metallic finish and a slightly contoured body for grip. It features a pointed tip at one end, likely for precision tasks, and a rounded cap at the opposite end. Along one side, there are two small red buttons and a recessed panel, suggesting user controls and possibly indicator lights. The body has ribbed sections for enhanced handling and a robust, industrial appearance. The device appears to be constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with some internal electronic components. Its size and design suggest it could be a specialized tool or instrument for urban maintenance or repair tasks.
description: A compact, dark metallic electronic tool with a pointed tip, ribbed grip, and red control buttons. It has an industrial design suitable for handheld use.
description_view_0: The object is viewed head-on from the pointed tip, showing the circular end and the symmetrical, contoured body.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the ribbed grip, two red buttons, and a recessed panel along the body, highlighting the control interface.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the rounded cap and the symmetrical ribbing along the body, with the pointed tip barely visible.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the ribbed grip and the smooth, uninterrupted surface, lacking the visible buttons of the other side.
